codeReview.summary: The re-review fixes one of the round-1 blockers: `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` now drops the stale retired-catalog request bullets and points accounting consumers at the surviving catalog DTOs, and `SalesControllerIT` has been restored to its pre-feature expectation. However, the packet still does not satisfy the required narrowing because the unrelated runtime valuation truth-suite change introduced by `385cfadd` remains present in the current tree.

issues.description: The final packet still includes the out-of-scope valuation test edit that switched this assertion from `currentSnapshot(company)` to `snapshotAsOf(company, LocalDate.of(2026, 3, 1))`. Mission guidance explicitly marks this truth-suite failure as outside the catalog packet (`/home/realnigga/.factory/missions/6976bae7-c2fe-4bf5-a28a-485480ce262a/AGENTS.md:41-45`), and `git diff --name-only 385cfadd^..095cfe36 -- erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/sales/SalesControllerIT.java erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/truthsuite/runtime/TS_RuntimeInventoryValuationExecutableCoverageTest.java` still lists `TS_RuntimeInventoryValuationExecutableCoverageTest.java`, showing the packet has not been fully narrowed back to in-scope cleanup work.

summary: Fail: the stale frontend-handoff bullets are fixed and the `SalesControllerIT` scope drift is gone, but the current repo still retains the unrelated `TS_RuntimeInventoryValuationExecutableCoverageTest` edit, so the cleanup-proof packet is not yet fully narrow.
